title: Dama Montalvo
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:DamaMontalvo.jpg]] |name=Dama Montalvo |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]][[Purge (comic book)|''Purge'']] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]''[[Jedi: Mace Windu]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=Brown |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin=Fair |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters=*[[Cei Vookto]] {{C|[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]}} *[[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] {{C|Brief Jedi Master}} |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Tell me where Obi-Wan Kenobi is hiding.''"
"''If I knew… I wouldn't tell!|Darth Vader and Dama Montalvo|}} '''Dama Montalvo''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] that served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Three [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|war's initiation]], Montalvo and his [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]], [[Cei Vookto]], [[Battle of Lianna|fought]] on behalf of the Republic on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]]. Although the battle ended in the Republic's favor, Vookto was [[Death/Legends|slain]]. Montalvo attended [[Funeral of Cei Vookto|Vookto's funeral pyre]] and came under Jedi Master [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi's]] command. About [[19 BBY/Legends|three years later]], Montalvo was captured by the forces of the newly–established [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], led by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]—the Republic's final [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]]—who had [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|declared]] the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] to be traitors. Montalvo was interrogated by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who hoped to gain information on the whereabouts of the former [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] member [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. After Montalvo refused to aid the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]], Vader executed the Jedi. ==Biography== A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Dama Montalvo was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Selected as the [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Cei Vookto]], Montalvo constructed his own [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] during his studies. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Montalvo took up the rank of [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] and joined his master on the front lines. [[File:TheDeathofDamaMontalvo.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] kills Dama Montalvo.]] During the [[Battle of Lianna|fighting]] on [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]], Vookto was slain and Montalvo was able to survive the battle, which ended in a victory for the Republic while the planet was left devastated. When the fighting ended, [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] and [[Master of the Order/Legends|Master of the Order]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] presided over [[Funeral of Cei Vookto|Vookto's funeral]] as the grieving Montalvo stood by. In order to keep Montalvo involved, the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] temporarily assigned Montalvo as the Padawan of Master [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] until a suitable replacement could be found. Surviving the rest of the war, Montalvo avoided the initial execution of [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency]] [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] which called for the death of all Jedi. Fleeing from the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] he once served alongside, Montalvo was captured by the newly-founded [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and held in a detention facility deep beneath the [[Senate Building/Legends|Senate Building]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. [[Torture/Legends|Tortured]] by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] tirelessly, Vader attempted to extract the location of [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] from the Padawan. Refusing to reveal any knowledge he may have, Vader snapped Montalvo's neck, an action "less than well done" according to his master [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]], who had further interrogations planned. ==Behind the scenes== Ostrander speculated that Montalvo was born in [[37 BBY/Legends|37 BBY]] on [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]].{{JCFCite|url=posts/21973967|board=Literature|thread=Getting to know the EU Jedi (John, Jan, Davide, Randy--feel free to help!)|user=[[John Ostrander|jfostrander]]|date=2005-10-17|time=8:43 AM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20180622020335/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/getting-to-know-the-eu-jedi-john-jan-davide-randy-feel-free-to-help.21960714}} ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi: Mace Windu]]'' {{1st}} *[[Purge (comic book)|''Purge'']] ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Dama Montalvo}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Dama Montalvo#legends |es=Dama Montalvo |fr=Dama Montalvo |pl=Dama Montalvo |pt=Legends:Dama Montalvo |deGA=1 }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Montalvo, Dama}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Jedi Commanders]] [[Category:Jedi Purge victims]] [[Category:Jedi trainees of the Jedi Order]] [[Category:Males]]
